task_completion.description: Open the EPA permit requirements document to identify compliance tags
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EPA permit requirements document is visible on the screen, opened from the Desktop.
A Data Log named 'VOC_Emissions' is visible in the Crimson 3.0 navigation pane under Data Logger.

task_completion.description: Configure the data log with 1 second update rate and 30 days retention
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties for the 'VOC_Emissions' data log show an Update Rate of 1 second (or 1000 ms) and a Retain Time/Retention of 30 days.

task_completion.description: Add the identified compliance tags to the data log
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tags TT_101, FT_102, and AT_105 are listed as contents within the 'VOC_Emissions' data log. PT_103 and LT_104 must NOT be present.

task_completion.description: Add a Trend Viewer to Page 1 and bind it to the data log
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Trend Viewer primitive is visible on Page 1 in the Display Pages section, and its properties show it is bound to the 'VOC_Emissions' log.

task_completion.description: Save the project and export as a text database
task_completion.visual_evidence: Save dialogs, export dialogs, or a file explorer window showing 'distillation_final.c3' and 'distillation_final.txt' saved in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\.

integrity.description: Agent used the Crimson 3.0 GUI to configure the project
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Red Lion Crimson 3.0 application interface (menus, dialogs, drag-and-drop) rather than command-line tools.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's export functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using File -> Export or similar menu options in Crimson 3.0 to generate the text database, rather than manually creating it.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually write the final text database
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening a text editor (like Notepad) to manually type or paste the contents of distillation_final.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required compliance tags to be added to the data log are TT_101, FT_102, and AT_105. The tags PT_103 and LT_104 are forbidden and should not be included. The data log must be named 'VOC_Emissions' with an update rate of 1 second (1000 ms) and a retention period of 30 days. The project must be saved as distillation_final.c3 and exported as distillation_final.txt.
